LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildWildClowns.title: Clown-Raised
LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildWildClowns.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the wilderness by a pack of wild clowns. Whether they were feral humans who found the clothes, or simply a comedy act gone too far, nobody knows. They tried, and failed to teach [PAWN_nameDef] any skills to survive in the wild. But they did teach [PAWN_objective] to have a good sense of 'humor.'
